name: VeloWorkflowTemplate
description: Reusable playbooks and learned workflows saved from successful autonomous actions

workflow_type.description: The type of action (e.g. proposal_drafting, task_decomposition)

trigger_context.description: When this template should be suggested

region.description: Target geographic region (e.g. Europe, Asia, Global)

work_type.description: Type of work (e.g. freelance, microtask, testing)

preferred_mode.description: The preferred execution mode (paid, free, local)

success_count.description: Number of times this template was used successfully
